full_rule_text: IF (haversine_km[long] AND pickup_dow[weekday]) AND pickup_hour[morning_rush] THEN [predicted_duration[very_long]]
IF (haversine_km[long] AND pickup_dow[weekday]) AND pickup_hour[evening_rush] THEN [predicted_duration[very_long]]
IF (haversine_km[medium] AND pickup_dow[weekday]) AND pickup_hour[morning_rush] THEN [predicted_duration[long]]
IF (haversine_km[medium] AND pickup_dow[weekday]) AND pickup_hour[evening_rush] THEN [predicted_duration[long]]
